mapper.select: SELECT id, name, age, major, phone, create_time AS CreateTime FROM student
SELECT id, name, age, major, phone, create_time AS CreateTime FROM student WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, age, major, phone, create_time AS CreateTime FROM student WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT id, name, age, major, phone, create_time AS CreateTime FROM student LIMIT #{offSet}, #{pageSize}
